summary: Added public static Support and Privacy Policy pages for Owlory under docs/support/index.html and docs/privacy/index.html, documented the App Store Connect URLs, and added a GitHub Pages workflow that publishes only those two public page directories instead of the full internal docs tree.
validations_passed: python3 -m http.server 8087 --directory docs with curl checks for /support/ and /privacy/
missing_proof_levels: GitHub Pages deployment has not run on GitHub Actions from main yet.

contract_status_changes.contract: App Store Connect public Support and Privacy Policy URL metadata
contract_status_changes.before: No repository-managed public Support or Privacy Policy pages were present.
contract_status_changes.after: Repository-managed static source pages exist under docs/support/ and docs/privacy/, with deployment configured to publish them at https://raelldottin.github.io/owlory/support and https://raelldottin.github.io/owlory/privacy.
proof: Local HTTP curl checks returned 200 text/html for /support/ and /privacy/.

residual_risks: GitHub Pages still needs repository Pages source set to GitHub Actions and a successful Deploy public App Store pages workflow run from main.
support@example.com is an explicit placeholder because no official Owlory support email was found in the repo.
recommended_next_reason: No adjacent queued slice remains for this App Store public-page work.
